2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

Derek Livingston

14 Maddox Dow

  • Ht./Wt. 5-10 / 175
  • Position G
  • Class Redshirt Freshman
  • Letters 0
  • Major Recreation Services, Sport & Hospitality Management
  • Hometown Shawnee, Kan.
  • Prev School De Soto High School
  • Bio
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

General: Completed his first season in the Pitt State program in 2024-25 after a standout prep career at De Soto High School.

2024-25: Did not appear in any game and redshirted.

HS: Prepped at De Soto High School for coach Matt Rice ... While a Wildcat, Dow was a two-year letter winner on the basketball court helping the team to a sub-state title in 2022 and 2024 along with being conference champions in 2022 and 2023.

Personal: Born May 7, 2006 ... Son of Mandi and Brendan Dow ... Named to the MIAA Newcomer Academic Honor Roll with a 3.70 GPA as a recreation services, sport & hospitality management major.

Statistics

Season:
2025-26
  • 2024-25
  • 2025-26
